title: SENIOR CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: JUNCTION CITY OFFICE SENIOR CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term energy assistance (LIHEAP), prescription drug assistance, transportation for groceries and medical appointments (provided by volunteers), and home visits (provided by Friendly Visitors/ Senior Companions and Elderhelp volunteers). 245 West 5th Avenue Junction City, OR 97448 Eligibility: Adults ages 60 and older or age 18 and older with physical disabilities Hours: By appointment only (541) 682-7806 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-7806 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Junction City (Lane County) Services: Disability Related Transportation Electric Service Payment Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Electric Service Payment Assistance * Older Adults Friendly Outreach Programs Gas Service Payment Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Gas Service Payment Assistance * Older Adults Heating Fuel Payment Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Heating Fuel Payment Assistance * Older Adults Prescription Expense Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Prescription Expense Assistance * Older Adults Senior Ride Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JUNCTION CITY OFFICE
